message:
feat(test): expand search_bridge inline tests from 6 to 49

Add 43 new unit tests for the search bridge module covering:
- BridgeCancellationToken: new, cancel, idempotency, clone sharing, async wakeup
- SearchBridgeRequest: defaults, builder methods, clone, Debug format
- SearchBridgeError: Display for all variants, Debug format
- SearchBridge: Debug, clone, from_shared Arc identity
- update_best_results: Initial/Refined/RefinementFailed phases, empty, sequential
- map_search_error: timeout priority, cancelled propagation, generic passthrough
- SearchBridgeResult: Debug, clone
- spawn_cancellation_thread: pre-cancelled, polls-and-stops
- spawn_timeout_thread: none, fires-on-expiry, done-early
- Integration: empty query, metrics, phase callback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
